data.title: Crypto News: ​President Trump Repeals IRS DeFi Tax Rule, Marking Milestone in U.S. Crypto Legislation​
data.description: According to Watcher Guru: On April 10, 2025, President Donald Trump signed a joint congressional resolution repealing a contentious Internal Revenue Service (IRS) rule that sought to extend tax reporting obligations to decentralized finance (DeFi) platforms.

data.title: Binance Futures to Launch PROMPTUSDT Perpetual Contract With 25x Leverage on April 11
data.description: Binance Futures has announced the launch of a new USDT-margined perpetual contract — PROMPTUSDT, offering up to 25x leverage, with trading going live on April 11, 2025 at 14:30 (GMT+8). This move expands the platform’s trading options as part of Binance’s ongoing effort to enhance user experience and capitalize on the rising interest in AI-integrated blockchain protocols.PROMPTUSDT Contract OverviewContract Name: PROMPTUSDTLaunch Time: April 11, 2025, 14:30 (GMT+8)Underlying Asset: PROMPT (Wayfinder)Settlement Asset: USDTMaximum Leverage: 25xTrading Hours: 24/7Minimum Price Change: 0.0001Funding Rate Cap: +2.00% / -2.00%Funding Interval: Every 4 hoursSupports Multi-Asset Mode: YesCopy Trading Availability: Within 24 hours after listingContract Address: 0x28d38dF637dB75533bD3F71426F3410a82041544

data.title: Binance will launch PROMPTUSDT perpetual contract
data.description: According to the official announcement, Binance will launch the PROMPTUSDT perpetual contract at 6:30 (UTC) on April 11, 2025, with a maximum leverage of 25 times. The contract supports multi-asset mode and will be open for contract copy trading within 24 hours of launch. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Ross Ulbricht to Make First Public Appearance at Bitcoin Conference
data.description: According to PANews, Ross Ulbricht, the founder of Silk Road, announced on social media that he will make his first public appearance and deliver a speech at the Bitcoin conference in Las Vegas. This marks his first public engagement since his release. Ulbricht was sentenced to life imprisonment for creating the darknet marketplace 'Silk Road' and received an unconditional pardon from U.S. President Donald Trump in January this year.

data.title: Significant Outflows Reported in GBTC, ARKB, BITB, and EZBC
data.description: According to BlockBeats, recent monitoring data indicates substantial net outflows from several investment products. GBTC experienced a net outflow of $44.6 million, while ARKB saw $12.7 million in net outflows. BITB reported a net outflow of $10.8 million, and EZBC had a net outflow of $9.2 million. These figures highlight notable movements in the investment landscape.

data.title: Trump Anticipates Challenges in Transition Phase Leading to Remarkable Outcome
data.description: According to BlockBeats, U.S. President Donald Trump has acknowledged that while the transition phase may present challenges, it will ultimately result in an extraordinary outcome.

data.title: Trump Crypto Project Transfers Significant Funds to Altcoin Wallet
data.description: According to BlockBeats, Arkham has detected a recent transaction involving the Trump crypto project WLFI. The project has transferred $775,000 from its main wallet to a wallet typically used for purchasing altcoins. This movement of funds suggests potential strategic shifts or investments within the project's operations.

data.title: Russian logistics company calls on government to legalize cross-border cryptocurrency payments
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News Russian logistics company ETE Group submitted a request to Prime Minister Mishustin, calling on the government to establish a legal framework for companies to use cryptocurrencies for international settlements. ETE Group suggested amending the Civil Code, the Tax Code and other relevant foreign exchange regulatory laws to give crypto assets legal status and establish standard procedures for their issuance, circulation and accounting. ETE pointed out that since 2024, Russian companies' interest in crypto payments has increased by about 40%. (Cryptonews)

data.title: Hyperliquid's revenue in the past 7 days has surpassed Tron and other protocols, ranking among the top three in the crypto revenue rankings
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to Defillama data, Hyperliquid's revenue in the past 7 days has risen to 13.52 million US dollars, surpassing Tron, Jupiter and other protocols and public chains, and temporarily ranked third in the crypto revenue list. Tether and Circle ranked first and second with 7-day revenues of 129 million US dollars and 44.25 million US dollars respectively.

data.title: CryptoQuant analyst: If Bitcoin fails to break through the $84,000 resistance level, it may consolidate around $80,000 in the short term
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News CryptoQuant analysts pointed out in the market report on April 10 that if Bitcoin (BTC) "continues to rise", it may encounter resistance near $84,000, but once it breaks through, the price is expected to rise quickly before the next resistance level of $96,000. If Bitcoin fails to break through the next resistance level, it may hover in the range above $80,000 in the short term (Cointelegraph).
